headline: Is It Too Late To Consider EMCOR Group (EME) After A 102% One Year Surge?
summary: Wondering if EMCOR Group at around US$789 per share is still offering value or if the easy gains are behind it? This article focuses squarely on what the current price might mean for you. The stock has posted returns of 3.9% over 7 days, 9.7% over 30 days and 23.6% year to date, with a 1 year return of 102.3% and a 3 year gain that is more than 4x. This naturally raises questions about what is already priced in. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in companies connected to...
